data.body:
## Description

**What**: Update project documentation to reflect the new archived-ticket exclusion defaults and --include-archived flag.
**Why**: Developers and agents need accurate awareness of the changed behavior — commands now exclude archived tickets by default, which is a behavioral change from the previous all-inclusive default.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md architecture section updates; ticket CLI reference updates; documenting --include-archived flag behavior and the ticket show exception
- OUT: Creating new documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md architecture section reflects the new archived-exclusion default and --include-archived flag
  ← Satisfies: "Commands that search/list/query tickets accept --include-archived to override the default exclusion"
- When this story is complete, ticket CLI reference documentation is updated with the new flag and the ticket show exception behavior

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence in your understanding of the work, approach, or intent. "High confidence" means clear evidence from the codebase or ticket context — not inference or reasonable assumption. When in doubt, stop and ask rather than guess.
Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
